message:
refactor(caam): Simplify ID generation using crypto.randomUUID

Replaces custom ID generation logic with the standard crypto.randomUUID()
function:

Before:
- Generated timestamp in base36 + 8 random chars from secure random bytes
- Required manual character selection from alphabet
- Custom string building loop

After:
- Uses crypto.randomUUID() which provides 122 bits of entropy
- Removes dashes for compact, URL-safe format
- Format: {prefix}_{uuid-without-dashes}

Benefits:
- Standardized, well-tested UUID v4 generation
- Guaranteed collision resistance (122 bits vs ~50 bits before)
- Simpler code, fewer lines to maintain
- Consistent ID length and format

The prefix (e.g., "acct_", "sess_") is preserved to maintain human
readability and quick identification of resource types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
